name: Harriet Cheryl Maloba
content: Very good quality cakes, texture, flavor and deco all on point

name: Anju Sandhu
content: The cake is always ready on time. it is fresh and the cake moisture is just right. The taste is unique with any flavour required. You are so talented that any cake is not impossible to make. keep up the good work.

name: Millyanne Njeri
content: Best cakes,worth every dime. I highly recommend Avi. Pays attention to details and meets the deadline. I am a happy client
